benchmarks.name: ARC-AGI
benchmarks.description: Abstract visual grid transformation tasks requiring general fluid reasoning.

benchmarks.name: HLE-Verified
benchmarks.description: Verified/revised Humanity's Last Exam with component-wise verification. https://huggingface.co/datasets/skylenage/HLE-Verified

benchmarks.name: Humanity's Last Exam
benchmarks.description: 2500+ expert-level questions across 100+ disciplines. Near-zero scores for most models at launch.

benchmarks.name: LiveBench
benchmarks.description: Contamination-resistant monthly-refresh benchmark. Verifiable answers across Reasoning/Math/Coding/Language/IF.

benchmarks.name: MuSR
benchmarks.description: Multistep Soft Reasoning ??long narrative reasoning (Open LLM Leaderboard v2).

benchmarks.name: QuAC
benchmarks.description: Question Answering in Context ??conversational reading comprehension (F1).

benchmarks.name: SQuAD
benchmarks.description: Reading comprehension ??extractive QA over Wikipedia passages.
